title: Armor Stand 12 Poses
description: This datapack adds 12 different positions from the Bedrock version of Minecraft to the Java version.
body:
### Java Armor Stand Poses (12 Poses)
Bedrock Armor Stand Poses is a Minecraft Java data pack that brings 12 unique armor stand poses from Bedrock Edition to Java Edition.

**✨ Features**

    Adds 12 Bedrock-style armor stand poses

    Manual interaction: Right-click on the leg section of the armor stand while directly facing the block it is standing on

    Redstone compatible: Any redstone signal exactly 1 block away from the stand triggers a pose change

    Works in both single-player and multiplayer worlds

⚠️ For Redstone activation to work properly, the signal must be exactly 1 block away from the armor stand. Even the slightest misplacement can cause the system to malfunction.

**🛠️ How does it work?**

Each pose change cycles through 12 different positions.

Players can manually trigger it by interacting with it.

Redstone blocks, torches, redstones, repeaters, comparators, buttons, levers, and more are supported (as long as they are active and properly placed). It works on the same principle as redstone systems in Minecraft. When sending signals, you can set up the system as if you were sending signals to normal systems.

**Notes:**

Automatically creates arms for all armor stands, allowing you to add any shield and sword you want to the armor stands. (All armor stands spawn with arms.)

**📦 Installation
**
Download the Datapack .zip file.

Place it in your world's datapacks folder.

Enter your world and run the 
```
/reload
```

command. You are now ready to use the new armor stand placement system!

**🧱  Compatibility**

    Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5+

    No mod or resource pack required

**👤 Creator**

Created by egementoni0922 ❤️

**💬 Feedback and Requests**

If you have any requests or feedback, please message EgemenKaragoz on Discord.
